purpose: Replace S2's hand-authored registry.generated.ts stub with a generator-emitted file produced by app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs (resolving MOCK-02-001), wire that generator plus the full value-validation suite into the npm/make build pipeline via a prebuild script so a non-conforming theme cannot reach next build, and author app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts as the authoritative value-level gate (schema/id, contrast, folder drift, order uniqueness, font-URL parity, zod-boundary + enum/treatment sync). Also performs the one S4-adjacent consumer edit AC-FONT-1 forces into this story: app/pages/_document.tsx renders its font <link> href from buildFontLinkHref(THEME_FONTS) instead of a hardcoded string.

public_api.name: generate-theme-registry.mjs (CLI)
public_api.description: Plain Node ESM (fs/promises, path, url only — never imports TypeScript). Globs app/src/themes/*/ for folders containing manifest.ts, performs only filesystem-derivable structural checks (manifest.ts present; folder name matches ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$), and emits app/src/themes/registry.generated.ts: one static import per theme, the AppThemeName union from folder names, an _all array, and eval-time wiring (order-sort + buildThemeFonts) matching the S2 stub's shape exactly. --check regenerates in memory and exits non-zero on any diff vs the committed file (does not write); default mode writes the file and exits non-zero only on a structural violation.

public_api.name: app/src/themes/registry.generated.ts (regenerated output)
public_api.signature: export type AppThemeName = ...; export const APP_THEMES: Record<AppThemeName, ThemeManifest>; export const THEME_FONTS: FontLoad[];
public_api.description: Same observable contract as the S2 hand-authored stub (architecture.md Registry seam contract) — now generator-emitted and committed. Consumed unchanged by themes/index.ts and, new in this story, by _document.tsx (THEME_FONTS) via fontUnion's buildFontLinkHref.

public_api.name: app/package.json prebuild script
public_api.description: npm-lifecycle-invoked automatically before `npm run build` (and therefore `make build`), so a non-conforming manifest aborts before next build ever runs (AC-DEP-1/AC-DEP-2).

public_api.name: app/tests/unit/themes-validation.test.ts
public_api.description: The value-level validation gate: ThemeManifestSchema.parse + id===folder + id regex (AC-VAL-2); real-hex contrast gate incl. non-hex fail-loud fixture (AC-VAL-1, carries S1's contrast-gate-requires-hex-tokens guarantee); folder-drift against the PURE registry.generated.ts APP_THEMES (AC-VAL-3 clause 1, carries S2's s3-freshness-targets-pure-registry guarantee); order-uniqueness via fixture (AC-VAL-4); font-URL byte-parity (AC-FONT-1); zod-boundary architectural scan over the full client-bundle-reachable module list plus the S1/S2 enum-catalog<->treatment-Record sync guarantee (AC-BOUND-1, supersedes zodBoundary.test.ts's S1-scoped early guard).

public_api.name: app/pages/_document.tsx (edited)
public_api.description: Renders the built Google-Fonts URL from THEME_FONTS (registry.generated.ts) via fontUnion's buildFontLinkHref instead of a hardcoded string literal (AC-FONT-1's forced consumer edit; the only S4-adjacent file this story touches).

owned_data: the generator's structural-check logic (folder has manifest.ts; folder name regex) and its --check idempotence comparison (app/scripts/generate-theme-registry.mjs)
the emitted registry.generated.ts scaffold shape (import lines, AppThemeName union, _all array, eval-time order-sort/buildThemeFonts wiring)
the prebuild wiring string in app/package.json
dependencies_allowed: generate-theme-registry.mjs -> node:fs/promises, node:path, node:url only (never a TypeScript import)

themes-validation.test.ts -> index (@/src/themes/index), schema (@/src/themes/schema, test-only import of ThemeManifestSchema/validateManifest), fontUnion (@/src/themes/fontUnion), contrast (@/src/themes/contrast), registry.generated (direct import of the PURE APP_THEMES/THEME_FONTS for drift/freshness assertions per the s3-freshness-targets-pure-registry carried guarantee)
dependencies_forbidden: generate-theme-registry.mjs -> any .ts file, ts-node, or a TypeScript compiler API
registry.generated.ts (emitted) -> buildChakraTheme.ts (registry carries data only) or any RUNTIME import of schema.ts (type-only ThemeManifest import only)
themes-validation.test.ts -> buildChakraTheme.ts directly (must go via index, matching the Boundary Rules table's 'themes-validation.test -> index, schema, fontUnion, contrast')

_document.tsx, useThemeStyles.ts, ThemeIcon.tsx, profile.tsx, i18n.ts edits beyond the single _document.tsx font-href change AC-FONT-1 forces (all other S4 consumer wiring is out of this story's scope)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/themes/parity.test.ts (regression — must stay green against the regenerated registry.generated.ts)
app/tests/unit/themes/zodBoundary.test.ts (regression — S1-scoped early guard, superseded but not deleted by the S3 full scan)
